{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Overlords
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Two remaining [[Redmoon Overlords]] summoned [[Blood Shadows]] around their weapons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
